name: gpt-oss-120b (Low)
archDisplay: Mixture-of-experts transformer, 128 experts/layer, top-4 active, 36 layers
note: OpenAI's first open-weight model since GPT-2; 117B MoE (5.1B active), Apache 2.0.
tpsNote: Does not fit on a single RTX 4090 (24GB); OpenAI specifies a single 80GB GPU (H100/MI300X) for native MXFP4 inference.

results.notes: AIME 2024, no tools, low reasoning effort
GPQA Diamond, no tools, low reasoning effort
HLE, no tools, low reasoning effort. Read directly from Table 3 of the official model card.
Tau-Bench Retail, low reasoning effort. Read directly from Table 3 of the official model card.
Aider Polyglot, low reasoning effort. Read directly from Table 3 of the official model card.
MMMLU average across 14 human-translated languages, low reasoning effort. Read directly from Table 2/Table 3 of the official model card.

Codeforces Elo, no terminal tool, low reasoning effort (1653 Elo with tool access, per the same table -- chose the no-tools figure for consistency with the model's other no-tools rows). Read directly from Table 3 of the official model card.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real. HF model card (fetched) confirms 117B total / 5.1B active params and Apache 2.0 license verbatim. Independent architecture writeups corroborate 36 layers, 128 experts/layer, top-4 routing, 131,072-token (128K) native context via YaRN. Fetched arxiv.org/html/2508.10925v1 model-card table directly and confirmed all four low-effort scores appear verbatim: AIME 56.3, GPQA 67.1, MMLU 85.9, SWE-bench Verified 47.9. No changes made.
